name: Ranshu, Meridian Auto Parts, Visionaire,Omega enviromenta technologies, Ap Air
message: We are going to upload about 47 gb of a bunch of companies. All of them are auto parts related. You will find detailed employees information (DOB, DL numbers and so on), HR files, financial and accounting information, lost of agreements and contracts, drawings, specifications, corporate credit card details, scans of documents with detailed personal information, customer data and so on.
